Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals, shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, an optional overlay, and a preview Studium Crafters workflow. Use /thestudium to open the window.
Changelog:
Studium Crafters status strip polish:
- Updates the workflow strip to use first-name Crafters status messages.
- Matches the GreenZone top-bar title font for the Crafters status text.
- Adds a Show Overlay / Hide Overlay toggle on the Crafters workflow strip.
